name: ai-thumbnail-farm
description: Enterprise AI-powered YouTube thumbnail generation system

scripts.setup: node -e "const os=require('os');const{exec}=require('child_process');const cmd=os.platform()==='win32'?'start setup.html':'open setup.html || xdg-open setup.html';exec(cmd);"
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../worker && pip install -r requirements.txt

author: AI Thumbnail Farm
